comment: Bhai, cold coffee ekdum lajawab thi! Aur staff bhi bohot friendly hai. Will visit again! ☕😊
managerReply: Thank you Rohan! Glad you loved the cold coffee.

comment: Alfredo Pasta was a bit dry, but the burger and mojito were great! Nice vibe.
Best cold coffee in Indiranagar! The seating is cozy and WiFi is very fast. 5/5 stars from Google My Business! ⭐
Lovely ambiance. Perfect place to sit with a laptop. Peri Peri fries were delicious! Google Local Guide review.
Staff is extremely polite. They helped us reserve a group table. Highly recommended! Sync review from GBP.
